title: Is Norway vs France on TV? Channel, time and how to watch World Cup clash
original_text:
Is Norway vs France on TV? Channel, time and how to watch World Cup clash
Norway vs France XIs: NO HAALAND - starting lineups, confirmed team news, injury latest for World Cup 2026 today
France and Norway face off as Group I reaches its conclusion tonight, but Erling Haaland is on the bench.
Les Bleus top the table by a single goal, with both sides taking two wins from their opening two matches of the tournament.
Advertisement
CLICK HERE TO FOLLOW NORWAY VS FRANCE LIVE!
Didier Deschamps has plumped for a mostly settled lineup, and he made three changes to his side for the 3-0 win over Iraq, which followed the 3-1 victory against Senegal.
Manu Kone partnered Adrien Rabiot in midfield, with Aurelien Tchouameni dropping to the bench, and Bradley Barcola was given the nod over Desire Doue on the left flank. Lucas Digne came in for Theo Hernandez at left-back.
Tchouameni, Doue and Hernandez all return here, while Mike Maignan will continue between the sticks, but William Saliba is rested to the bench as Chelsea transfer target Maxence Lacroix partners Dayot Upamecano in central defence.
Advertisement
As for Norway, Stale Solbakken has made wholesale changes.
Martin Odegaard and Haaland are named on the bench as Oscar Bobb is joined in attack by Andreas Schjelderup and Jorgen Strand Larsen.
Confirmed team news
Norway XI: Selvik; Aursnes, Ostigard, Falchener, Bjorkan; Aasgaard, Berg, Thorstvedt; Bobb, Strand Larsen, Schjelderup.
Substitutes: Nyland, Tangvik, Ajer, Heggem, Ryerson, Pedersen, Wolfe, Langas, Odegaard, Berge, Aursnes, Nusa, Hauge, Thorsby, Haaland, Sorloth
Advertisement
France XI: Maignan; Kounde, Upamecano, Lacroix, T.Hernandez; Kone, Tchouameni; Dembele, Olise, Doue; Mbappe
Substitutes: Risser, Samba, Digne, Gusto, L.Hernandez, Konate, Saliba, Kante, Rabiot, Zaire-Emery, Akliouche, Barcola, Cherki, Mateta, Thuram
Date and time: 8pm on Friday, June 26, 2026
Venue: Boston Stadium
How to watch: ITV
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
